failedAssertions.reason: Trade calendar only spans 2026-01-01 to 2026-12-31. Code correctly sets start_date='20210101' in calendar_updater.py but update_trade_calendar() has not been re-executed to populate the 2021-2025 date range in the database.

Only 242 trading days in calendar (expected 1,300-1,700 for 6-year range). Root cause same as VAL-INFRA-003: calendar database only covers 2026 since update_trade_calendar() was not re-run after the code change.

appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Flow Validator Guidance: shell (data-infra-fix)' section for shell-based validation of infrastructure assertions
